title: Vibrant Atmosphere
description:
Changes Fog- and Colormaps-Settings to make the Atmosphere more Vibrant. 
(Vanilla-Friendly!)
body:
## 🌿 Vibrant Atmosphere (Vanilla+)
Bring Minecraft to life with a more **colorful** and **immersive atmosphere** – while staying **true to the vanilla style**.  
This resource pack enhances **every biome** with _subtle_ but _impactful changes_, making the world **feel richer and more vibrant**.


### 🌄 Overview
![SumiiRings Vibrant Atmosphere](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff63c7b9ff6528b36af1996fc8d92246b697d60c.jpeg)



## ✨ Features
- Custom **fog settings** for immersive depth  
- Reworked **colormaps** across all biomes  
- Subtle **lighting adjustments** for a natural, lively feel  

➡️ No unnecessary bloat – just clean, atmospheric improvements that make Minecraft **more vibrant, immersive, and true to vanilla**.


## 🔗 Required Mods / Dependencies
To get the full experience, please install the following mods:

- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) – Performance & rendering improvements  
- [Smooth Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/smooth-skies) – Cleaner, seamless sky transitions  
- [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone) – Advanced resourcepack-driven effects  
- [Better Clouds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-clouds) – Enhanced, more dynamic cloud rendering 


---

> For best experience download the recommended Mods | Fog-behaviour inspired by dosya

---
